query:
-- Verificar últimas transações criadas
SELECT id, admin_id, cliente_id, tipo, valor, descricao, DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(data/1000), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as data_formatada
FROM transactions
ORDER BY data DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 6G4J6icMmx5rEXy.0667aace6315 --database dyVJYfPkMaKo6dqqnRNgqj --execute 
-- Verificar últimas transações criadas
SELECT id, admin_id, cliente_id, tipo, valor, descricao, DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(data/1000), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as data_formatada
FROM transactions
ORDER BY data DESC
LIMIT 10;
